name: mermaid-toolkit-for-google-docs
description: Render Mermaid diagrams as images directly in Google Docs.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && ([ -n "$(find src/gas/server -name '*.ts' 2>/dev/null)" ] && tsc --noEmit -p src/gas/server/tsconfig.json || true) && ([ -n "$(find src/gas/shared src/gas/dialogs -name '*.ts' 2>/dev/null)" ] && tsc --noEmit -p src/gas/tsconfig.dialogs.json || true)

author: Numan Aral
